Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to generate a list of targeted open ended questions to ask an interviewee about a property onboarding process The questions should aim to Uncover missing details Understand decision criteria Clarify roles and responsibilities Verify timing and sequencing Learn about how exceptions are handled

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should not ask for SQL queries or implementation details just conceptual understanding questions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me think about the process described and identify areas where clarification would be useful Initial landlord contact regional office handling Documentation review by property coordinator Property details entry into central database Property manager assignment Introductory call meeting Photographer and inspector scheduling Marketing material creation Property activation in rental portal Tenant screening Lease finalization Quality checks and internal audits Ongoing communication and exception handling

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me create a comprehensive list of questions organized by these areas

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ill make them open ended to encourage detailed responses Ill structure this nicely with categories for clarity Let me make sure the questions are truly open ended not yes no and target the specific areas mentioned

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is a good comprehensive list Let me organize it into a clear structure with categories for better readability
